content.title: Boogie boogie
content.description: Stand up and do a disco dance for 5-10 seconds
content.author: anon

content.title: NOOT
content.description: NOOT NOOT AS LOUD AS POSSIBLE and then poke someone to make them drink
content.author: Gong

content.title: Jump For Joy!
content.description: Do a jumping jack for every year since you were born!
content.author: anon

content.title: Looking kinda dumb
content.description: Put your finger and your thumb in the shape of an 'L' on your forehead until your next turn
content.author: Smash mouth

content.title: Group hug
content.description: Everyone present must hug each other, all at once.
content.author: Anon

content.title: Surprise
content.description: Do not read out loud and make sudden loud screech
content.author: anon

content.title: Silent j
content.description: For the remainder of the game, everyone has to pronounce names with j's as though the j is silent. E.g. 'john' becomes 'ohn'
content.author: anon

content.title: Pyramids
content.description: Build a human pyramid or everyone drinks
content.author: anon

content.title: Bunyip Booooooyz
content.description: Do your best bunyip  impression
content.author: Liam

content.title: NELLIE THE ELLIE-PHANT
content.description: Do you best Elephant Impression
content.author: Ian 2.0

content.title: YEEEEET
content.description: Throw something into the nearest Bin/Basket. Drink if you miss, nominate a drink if you succeed
content.author: Ian

content.description: Write on a piece of paper and stand faraway from everyone else. Slowly walk closer. First person who can read what you wrote gets 100 pts
content.author: Gong

content.title: QUICK MAFS
content.description: What is the square root of 225? If you can't answer in 10 seconds, Lose 100 points
content.author: IAN

content.title: shenanigans a foot
content.description: put your big beautiful foot to your face - if you can't put it to someone else's
content.author: IAn dingo dongo

content.title: I'M A REAL BOY
content.description: Last one to put a shoe on their head loses 100 points
content.author: Ian

content.title: WHAT'S IN MY HAND?
content.description: Quickly hide something in your hand, If nobody can guess correctly, take 100 points from someone of your choice
content.author: Ian

content.title: No talk me angy
content.description: Tell us one thing that makes you angry
content.author: Gong

content.title: TPYGE
content.description: Name a country adjacent to Egypt or lose 100 points
content.author: Ian

content.title: Oui Oui
content.description: Do your best French accent - Get 200 points if people approve
content.author: Ian

content.title: TETRIS-ED
content.description: Make yourself into the shape of your favourite Tetromino
content.author: Ian

content.title: Huhuhuhuhuhuhu
content.description: Laughter is the best medicine. Have a good chuckle 🤭🤭🤭
content.author: anon

content.title: Po-tae-to po-ta-to
content.description: Take turns to name different ways you can eat potatoes. First person so run out or repeat drinks.
content.author: Gong

content.title: Bork
content.description: Imitate an animal, first person to guess +100. If no one gets it in 2 guesses each, -300 for you
content.author: anon

content.title: Fren where art thou
content.description: Close your eyes, everybody else hides (within same room). Keep your eyes closed and go searching. Last person to be found +200
content.author: anon

content.title: Spill the tea
content.description: Name your least favourite person that somebody playing has dated
content.author: anon

content.title: Animal crossing
content.description: Why did the chicken cross the road? Best answer gets 200 points
content.author: Buh-kay

content.title: Achoo
content.description: Oh no You have caught a bug! At any point in the game, sneeze loudly. Whoever is visibly surprised takes a drink
content.author: Whatrdis

content.title: Poet
content.description: Write an acrostic poem describing a player using their name. +100
content.author: Gong

content.title: Birthday buster
content.description: Do you have friends? - Everyone guesses your birthday. Those who get it wrong must drink.
content.author: JoJo

content.title: Lemons from life
content.description: Bite into a lemon and swallow the bite. Get your vitamins. If you make a face, drink.
content.author: JoJo

content.title: R CARD
content.description: NAME 5 COUNTRIES STARTING WITH R IN THE NEXT 10 SECONDS OR DRINK- NO REPUBLICS
content.author: anon

content.title: Talk with your butt
content.description: Standup, unpants and start using your butt as a puppet to talk
content.author: Yuhe

content.title: Dabnation
content.description: Do the Mexican wave but with dabbing +100
content.author: anon

content.title: Pen is fun
content.description: Play the penis game - yell penis louder than the person before you. If you pull out (pun intended) during the game, keep drinking until there is a winner.
content.author: Chewyii

content.title: be flexible
content.description: do the splits. +100 points if you can, -100 if you can't, -200 if you don't even try you filthy giver upper.
content.author: anon

content.title: look at this photograph
content.description: show everyone your most recent photo on your phone
content.author: nickelback

content.title: Pictionary
content.description: Draw something! If someone gets it, +200 points!
content.author: MomentsOfJoy

content.title: shit stirrer
content.description: say something controversial. +100 points if the room is divided. -100 if shit was not stirred. +500 points if someone actually gets shitty.
content.author: centipede man is a babe

content.title: Bye-lingual
content.description: If you draw this card, you are not allowed to speak english for the next 15 minutes
content.author: anon

content.title: Who's your daddy
content.description: Tell a dad joke
content.author: anon

content.title: You are baby
content.description: You have become a baby! Everyone has to talk to you as though you are a baby for the next 15 minutes
content.author: Googoogaga

content.title: Wag wag
content.description: Who's a good boy/girl? Everyone must talk to you like you're a dog until your next turn.
content.author: anon

content.title: Just one
content.description: Everyone has to describe you using one word. No repeats.
content.author: anon

content.title: Hanabi
content.description: draw a card without looking at it. Everyone else must act it out to you.
content.author: anon

content.title: Like nobody is watching
content.description: Dance like nobody is watchng ❤︎
content.author: anon

content.title: Karaoke Night
content.description: You must sing instead of talk for the next five minutes
content.author: @_SupremeDevice

content.title: REVERSE!
content.description: Change the direction of play
content.author: anon

content.title: Draw Four
content.description: Draw 4 more cards baby
content.author: UNO Baby

content.title: What's in the box?
content.description: If you are the first person to pick up the box; put something in the box. The next person to pick up the box suffers the consequence, then the box is empty again.
content.author: anon

content.title: REVERSE
content.description: Reverse the order of card selection
content.author: Ian

content.title: Eye of truth
content.description: Pick up the next card. You may choose to play it or skip it
content.author: anon

content.title: ACE of SPADES
content.description: Make a rule
content.author: Ian

content.title: Generosity
content.description: Give a card to whoever you want
content.author: Meez

content.title: Skip
content.description: Skip the next person!
content.author: MomentsOfJoy

content.title: Card inception
content.description: Keep picking up until you get a blank. Do what those cards say. Then create a card.
content.author: Inception

content.title: the switcharoo
content.description: Switch any object, or feature one you/from you, with another player
content.author: anon

content.title: Double Trouble
content.description: While this card is in play, double the effect of any other card that is played
content.author: eX

content.title: power play
content.description: play 2 cards. draw 2 cards.
content.author: anon

content.title: A Hoverboarding Penguin?!
content.description: He's here to block a negative effect for you!
content.author: Keyrub

content.title: SCREAM
content.description: literally just yell
content.author: me

content.title: Weird string
content.description: Talk about string as if it’s the most amazing thing for 45seconds
content.author: anon

content.title: Birds Aren't Real
content.description: This card doesn't exist and neither do any bird cards in play, discard all Bird cards
content.author: Daniel The Conquerer

content.title: Ctrl + Z
content.description: Pick a previously played card from anyone and remove it from play, reverse the effect of the card when doing so.
content.author: Daniel The Conquerer

content.title: You're the president now.
content.description: Everyone has to call you Mr/Ms President, and you can veto any card once
content.author: anon

content.title: Sheild of sheilding
content.description: At any time you can block any other card being played (even for other people)
content.author: Daniel The Conquerer

content.title: Conjoined Twins
content.description: Play this on any person, That person and the person to their right are now conjoined. They each have separate turns, but all of their cards and resources are shared.
content.author: Daniel The Conquerer

content.title: Me and My Friend
content.description: For each person at the table that hasn't annoyed you this game: Draw a card, +200 points
content.author: anon

content.title: NYOOOMMMMM
content.description: Throw something at any player. If it hits them, you steal 200 points from that player. If they catch the item, they steal 100 points from you. if you miss, you get nothing
content.author: anon

content.title: Engineering
content.description: Draw an additional card at the start of your turns.
content.author: HermitMonk

content.title: forg
content.description: it is forgs birthday. if you do not say happy birthday, forg will cry. you wouldn't let forg cry on his birthday, would you?
content.author: Temmie Mew

content.title: Eye In The Sky
content.description: Players play with their hands revealed
content.author: Kaze

content.title: Throwing Star
content.description: Pick any one card. That card gets discarded.
content.author: DeadlySprinklez

content.title: Electric discharge
content.description: Destroy target card
content.author: anon

content.title: Reverse Boost Pad
content.description: You hit a boost pad--but it was installed incorrectly, so you get shot back. Replay the last card played.
content.author: anon

content.title: EXPLODE!
content.description: uh oh! everyone discards one card from their hand, or two from in front of them!
content.author: nresponse

content.title: Shy Guy
content.description: If you have this card at the end of the game, +400 points. If you make eye contact with anybody and don't have a pumpkin on your head, give them this card.
content.author: anon

content.title: Warrior Priest
content.description: Pick a player. That player immediately draws and plays the next non-blank card.
content.author: anon

content.title: Shield
content.description: Destroy and remove the effects of a negative card from last turn
content.author: AG

content.title: False Reflection
content.description: Retrigger the previous card as if you had played it, BUT all positive numbers become negative, and vice versa.
content.author: Rom

content.title: Pot of Greed
content.description: Draw 2 cards.
content.author: anon

content.title: Imposter
content.description: Vote someone out. They leave the room for 1 minute
content.author: anon

content.title: Oh no! What's that!?
content.description: Put this into play at any time. At the end of your turn, if no one has mentioned this, draw three cards, play one of them, and discard this.
content.author: Belle_Flower

content.title: Crabtacular
content.description: Snip snip. The player on your left and right must discard a card
content.author: T

content.title: Counterspell
content.description: Counter a card with... whatever this is.
content.author: anon

content.title: Not in *this* game!
content.description: Choose and destroy up to one card you don't control. It's gone forever (for this game).
content.author: Me!

content.title: MEOW MRRP
content.description: Draw a cat. Whoever draws the best cat (Vote. You can’t vote for yourself.) gets 200 points.
content.author: Sploinky

content.title: What's your last saved meme?
content.description:
Yo! Right now. Post in chat what's your last saved meme in your gallery!

If you don't minus 5 points if you have a ranking system
content.author: -Idk_who (Dare)

content.title: THAT CARD SUCKS
content.description: Remove one card or rule from the game. Get it out of there
content.author: ZanesBrains

content.title: Greedy Goblin
content.description: Steal a card from another player and immediately play it, gaining any and all benefits
content.author: ZanesBrains

content.title: Goblin Assassin
content.description:
Play this card silently and steal another players card.
If you are caught, place in discard pile. 
If you are not caught, place in hand.
content.author: ZanesBrains

content.title: Vulture
content.description: When another player puts their hand of cards down, you may discard this to look at and steal a card from it.
content.author: TransFur(ry)Student

content.title: fucking goku
content.description: goku shows up and kills everyone. start over and play new cards
content.author: gionnovania

content.title: What's your favourite conspiracy?
content.description: like aliens or whatever, I dunno whatever you're into
content.author: anon

content.title: Love yourself
content.description: Good doge wants you to share one thing you love about yourself uwu
content.author: anon

content.title: Spells
content.description: Name 5 spells you learnt from Hogwarts for +300 points!
content.author: MomentsOfJoy

content.title: Sweet nothings
content.description: Choose someone to take a drink. Gently whisper a compliment to them as they drink.

content.title: Democracy
content.description: Make a divisive statement. Take a vote. Minority drinks. If tie, no one drinks.
content.author: anon

content.title: king
content.description: everyone playing the game must call you 'King (OR QuEEN) [LAST NAME]'
content.author: anon

content.title: Human pyramid
content.description: Build a human pyramid. +100 points for everyone that is in the pyramid
content.author: anon

content.title: Magic potion
content.description: Make a shot sized drink out of anything (edible) you want. Choose a person to drink it. +300 for them.
content.author: anon
